---
title: "Joshua Ferrer-Lozano"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: cropped_profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/joshuarflozano/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/Awoo56709
    - text: Email
      href: "mailto:joshuar.f.lozano@gmail.com"
---

::: {#bio}

Welcome! I’m a graduate student in Environmental Data Science at UCSB, specializing in geospatial analysis, reproducible workflows, and environmental data communication. My background spans data cleaning, climate research, visualization, and sustainability analytics.

I earned dual degrees in Environmental Studies & Planning and Economics from Sonoma State University in 2017. After graduating, I served as an AmeriCorps VISTA in Honolulu’s Office of Climate Change, Sustainability and Resiliency, where I worked on environmental policy for the Caldwell Administration and helped develop the city’s first greenhouse gas inventory and sustainability metrics. Later, as a Peace Corps volunteer in Georgia, I supported a local NGO by modernizing its digital and data systems, building its website, developing a program‑tracking database, and teaching Excel and introductory Python to youth.

:::
